Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet collects offer and requests token using DPoP proof
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP proof (JWT with thumbprint)
- Pre-authorized code
- Token endpoint
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with access token and nonce; DPoP binding confirmed

Action: Wallet requests token refresh using new DPoP proof and nonce; Obtains new access token
Data:
- Refresh token
- New DPoP proof with updated thumbprint
- New nonce
- Token endpoint
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with new access token and updated nonce

Action: Wallet requests credential using refreshed access token and new DPoP proof
Data:
- Refreshed access token
- New DPoP proof with matching thumbprint
- Credential request with DPoP binding
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 200 with credential using refreshed token
